---
name: kubernetes-deployer
description: >
  Deploy and manage Kubernetes clusters with automated rollbacks,
  blue-green deployments, and health checking.
triggers:
  - deploy kubernetes
  - manage k8s cluster
  - kubernetes rollback
  - blue-green deployment
---

# kubernetes-deployer

Deploy Kubernetes clusters safely with full rollback support.

## When to Use

- Deploying applications to Kubernetes
- Managing cluster state and rollouts
- Automating blue-green or canary deployments

## Usage

```bash
python scripts/search.py "deploy kubernetes"
```
